mapper.sql: file_id, folder_id, category, media_type, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, object_name, file_hash, storage_provider, biz_type, biz_id, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = '2' AND file_id IN
#{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_file WHERE folder_id = #{folderId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_file WHERE folder_id = #{folderId} AND del_flag IN ('0', '2')
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_file SET del_flag = '0', delete_by = NULL, delete_time = NULL, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE del_flag = '2' AND file_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = '2' AND delete_time IS NOT NULL AND delete_time < #{deadline} ORDER BY delete_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_file WHERE object_name = #{objectName} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1
